{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Dawnwing
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dawnwing]] is the name of [[Ziel]]'s sect.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|"Dawnwing!" The man recognized the symbol of Ziel’s sect.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
